assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_016",
  "rule_id": "Ensure PAM Enforces Password Requirements - Enforce for root User",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.96,
  "rationale": "Policy classifies password complexity rule remediation as safe_to_remediate.",
  "risk_factors": [
    "pam configuration",
    "root account password policy"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Backup /etc/security/pwquality.conf",
    "Add or modify enforce_for_root to require complex passwords",
    "Ensure file ends with newline",
    "Validate configuration syntax if needed"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": true,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": false
}
